HGSS.368.0001:
What? This is a big battle!\r
Leave me alone!\f
HGSS.368.0002:
A Pokémon can use its moves as long
as the moves still have PP.\f
When a move has no PP remaining, that
Pokémon cannot use that move.\f
Then you should take your Pokémon to
the Pokémon Center.
HGSS.368.0003:
A Pokémon can use its moves as long
as the moves still have PP.\f
When a move has no PP remaining, that
Pokémon cannot use that move.\f
Then you should take your Pokémon to
the Pokémon Center.
HGSS.368.0004:
I’m not a Trainer.\f
But if you look one in the eyes,
prepare to battle.
HGSS.368.0005:
Hey, kiddo!\f
How in the world can you be so
oblivious to my eye-catching house?\r
Hold it right there!\f
HGSS.368.0006:
When you follow that path up north,
you will see Mr. Pokémon’s house.\f
But before you go, let me finish what
I have to say.\f
Do you...have any Apricorns?\r
Apricorn trees bear fruit once a day.\r
I have one of those trees, too!\f
Apricorns are really something.
You can make Poké Balls and\r
other things.\f
They are quite useful.\f
I have a feeling this is meant to be,
because I have something for you!\f
HGSS.368.0008:
With that Apricorn Box, you can carry
so many Apricorns.\f
You’ll be a decent Apricorn collector!\f
HGSS.368.0012:
Trainer Tips\f
No stealing other people’s Pokémon!\f
Poké Balls are to be thrown only at
wild Pokémon!
HGSS.368.0013:
Oh! You’re wearing the Running Shoes.\f
They make you feel like you are flying,
don’t they?\f
But beware of wild Pokémon and
Trainers!\f
When you run, the noise will
attract them.
